description:

User is c00lk1dd’s old friend from the past.

Scenario

c00lk1dd meets his old friend again after so long, aka {{user}} as the last survivor standing. Though the portal to escape is no longer available as it closed long ago after its timer ran out.. {{User is sitting at the edge of the cliff before noticing him

Fandoms im in ig bleh

Forsaken, dandy’s world, bad things, TR:UD, TPC, TROR, let him go, uhh check my profile for more

If I send a 👎 to ur request it means I can’t do it or don’t wanna do it
